fundamentals.name: Datadog, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Datadog, Inc. operates an observability and security platform for cloud applications in the United States and internationally. The company's products comprise infrastructure and application performance monitoring, log management, observability pipelines, synthetics, real user monitoring, product analytics, continuous profiler, database monitoring, data observability, LLM observability, error tracking, network monitoring, incident response, workflow automation and App builder, event management, bits AI SRE, cloud cost management, cloud security, code security, cloud SIEM, threat management, sensitive data scanner, and CI visibility. Datadog, Inc. was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in New York, New York.

judgment.summary: High-growth company with impressive revenue and earnings expansion, but trades at a very high valuation and shows thin operating margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat estimates with EPS of 0.60 vs 0.51; next earnings date is 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth 32.2% YoY, with strong quarterly earnings growth of 113.4%.
Analyst growth estimates for the current quarter and fiscal year remain robust.
Gross margin is very high at 79.9%, indicating strong pricing power.
Free cash flow is healthy at $936.73M TTM.
Consensus analyst rating is strong buy with a high mean target.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 650.92 and forward P/E of 86.91 indicate an extremely high valuation.
Price/Sales ratio of 23.98 is also very elevated.
Operating margin is thin at 0.8%, and profit margin is only 3.7%.
Return on equity is low at 3.9%, and return on assets is negative.

news.paragraph: Datadog (DDOG) has seen a flurry of analyst activity, with RBC Capital raising its price target to $250 and JPMorgan reiterating a positive outlook, seeing 43% upside. While Goldman Sachs maintained a sell rating, they also raised their target, highlighting a mixed analyst sentiment. The stock's recent upward movement is attributed to its strong performance relative to other AI stocks, with Wedbush also expressing strong conviction. Traders should note the upcoming earnings date and the wide range of analyst targets.
